scripts.stills: remotion still StoryVideo out/scene-1.png --frame=135 --overwrite && remotion still StoryVideo out/scene-2.png --frame=285 --overwrite && remotion still StoryVideo out/scene-3.png --frame=435 --overwrite
scripts.render: remotion render StoryVideo out/three-heroes-vs-lu-bu-render.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18 --concurrency=1 --overwrite && remotion ffmpeg -y -i out/three-heroes-vs-lu-bu-render.mp4 -map 0:v:0 -c:v copy -an out/three-heroes-vs-lu-bu-silent.mp4
